name_en: 【Haiyuan Exclusive Real Shot Chip Version】 M45716 Grey Print Small Flower 】M12749 This Néonoé BB handbag is crafted from the brand's new Monogram Ink leather, brightening the handbag series with a classic print while revealing a modern style. Woven chains and dazzling metal accents add an elegant touch, while the interior design securely holds valuables. 20 x 20 x 13 cm (Length x Height x Width)
